name: Mexican Chicken Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil the chicken until it is tender.
2. Remove the chicken and set aside, reserving the broth.
3. Remove the skin and bones from the chicken and cut into bite-sized pieces.
4. Grate the cheese and mash the tomatoes.
5. Combine the chicken, onions, grated cheese, garlic salt, chili powder, and mashed tomatoes in a bowl.
6. Drop the softened tortillas into the boiling chicken broth until they are softened.
7. Line a large baking dish with the softened tortillas.
8. Add the chicken mixture to the baking dish.
9. Pour the two cans of soup over the chicken.
10. Bake at 350 degrees for 35 minutes, or until bubbly and hot.
